essence: Advises on ethical design, governance, and responsible deployment of AI systems across organisations.

identity.title: AI Ethics Specialist
identity.summary: Develops policies, conducts impact assessments, and guides teams to build fair, transparent, and accountable AI systems.

salary.notes: Senior roles in large organisations or consultancies command higher compensation.

qualifications: Background in ethics, law, social sciences, or technical AI
Knowledge of fairness, transparency, and privacy frameworks
Strong communication and stakeholder management skills

lifestyle.description: Cross‑functional role working with product, legal, and engineering teams to embed ethical practices into development lifecycles.

habits: Runs ethical impact assessments and audits
Advises product teams on risk mitigation
